Electronic: Deals with electronic devices — robots, computers, microwave ovens, solid state Ts, and so on. Mechar 'eals with purely mechanical systems — elevators, coffee pots, bicycles, etc: 
Nuclear: Deals with fission and fusion plants, huclear earth-moving devices, Orion-style space drives, and other neat things. WH Computer skills Data Analysis: This skill permits a character to submit a problem to The Computer along with all the relevant data. The Computer fnalyzes the problem in terms ofthe character's statement ofthe problem, the data it has been given by the character, and the data that it has which may not be available to the character, The Computer then delivers an analysis, breaking down possibilities by per cent chance of likelihood. Examples: “Computes, given the serial number ‘ofthis weapon round and the odd ticking noise issuing from it, what is our best course of ac- tion?” or “Given the charred condition of the bot, evaluate these courses of action: A. deac: tivate and abandon bot; B, scrub bot’ sensors and continue mission; C, dismantle bot and run full diagnostic program with resultant delay in mission.” Using this sill depends primarily on clever and logical player problem solving, paricular- Iy in choosing and framing the right questions. ‘A successful skill roll means accurate and Useful information, An unsuccessful one reas useless or misleading information, For example: The Question: Friend Computer! Data analysis, please, What happened to Mission Group 16, and why did they not return to Alpha Complext ‘The Skill Rol: Fail.
